hero.name: Enzo Norese
hero.title: Backend Developer & Cloud Architect
hero.description: I design and build scalable, resilient systems that power modern applications. Passionate about clean architecture, distributed systems, and developer experience.

jobs.description: Developed a full-cycle recruitment and selection platform on Microsoft Azure. Key responsibilities include Node.js API development, React client applications, serverless functions with Azure Functions and TypeScript, multi-database design (SQL Server, PostgreSQL, CosmosDB, MongoDB, Redis cache), real-time messaging via Azure SignalR, Event Bus Service integration, blob/queue/table storage, backend architecture design, API and database documentation, and CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions.

Maintained, debugged, and developed new features for integration APIs built with C# (.NET Core 3.1) and JavaScript (Node.js). Also responsible for maintaining continuous integration and deployment workflows.
Responsible for repairing and maintaining a wide variety of electronic equipment, with specialization in digital cameras and printers.

skills.subtitle: Technologies I work with and milestones I'm proud of

stories.label: Faster API
stories.description: Reduced average API response time from 350ms to 105ms through strategic caching and query optimization.

stories.label: Users Served
stories.description: Led architecture of a distributed system handling over one million daily active users with 99.9% uptime.

stories.label: Cost Reduction
stories.description: Cut cloud infrastructure costs by 35% through resource right-sizing and reserved instance planning.

stories.label: Deploy Speed
stories.description: Reduced deployment time from 4 hours to 20 minutes by implementing a fully automated CI/CD pipeline.

projects.subtitle: A selection of things I've built

items.title: CloudMonitor
items.description: Real-time infrastructure monitoring dashboard with anomaly detection, alerting, and cost analysis. Built for DevOps teams managing multi-cloud environments.

items.title: DevFlow
items.description: Developer productivity platform that integrates GitHub, Jira, and Slack into a unified workflow. Reduces context switching and improves team velocity.

items.title: SecureGate
items.description: Lightweight API gateway with built-in rate limiting, JWT authentication, and request transformation. Drop-in replacement for Azure API Management in small projects.

items.title: DataPilot
items.description: Visual ETL pipeline builder that lets teams create, schedule, and monitor data workflows without writing code. Supports 20+ data source connectors.

items.title: ERP Bridge
items.description: Migration toolkit for ERP systems that handles data mapping, validation, and rollback. Used to migrate 5+ years of operational data with zero downtime.

items.title: LogStream
items.description: Distributed log aggregation and analysis platform. Ingests millions of events per second with real-time search and alerting capabilities.

contact.subtitle: Let's work together
contact.description: I'm currently open to new opportunities. Whether you have a project in mind, a question, or just want to say hi — my inbox is always open.
